_comment: Thresholds for Web (Playwright/Chromium) Release perf guard. Metrics: tokensStartMs (Home:refresh:start:tokens timestamp), tokensSpanMs (done-start), functionCallCount (#lines in function_call.log). Values are absolute; trigger when median > threshold (strategy=median).
_baseline_note: Computed from sample sessions perf-ml5aoi37-9qlvbx / perf-ml5aot0u-ij5dcc / perf-ml5ap3zv-pcw47e with +10% tolerance (median strategy tolerates 1 outlier run).
